title: Workhorse Group Reports Third Quarter 2024 Results
text:
Workhorse Group Q3 2024 Financial Results

Report Date: November 19, 2024

Period Covered: Third quarter ended September 30, 2024

Key Financial Metrics

Quarterly Results (Q3 2024 vs Q3 2023): Sales: $2.5 million vs $3.0 million. Cost of sales: $6.6 million vs $6.6 million. Gross loss: $4.1 million vs $3.5 million. Net loss: $25.1 million vs $30.6 million. Loss per share: $0.98 vs $2.84.

Nine-Month Results (Jan-Sept 2024 vs 2023): Sales: $4.7 million vs $8.7 million. Net loss: $80.6 million vs $78.7 million. Loss per share: $4.06 vs $8.29.

Balance Sheet (as of September 30, 2024): Cash and equivalents: $3.2 million. Total assets: $101.4 million. Current liabilities: $49.6 million. Stockholders' equity: $47.3 million.

Key Operational Highlights

CEO Rick Dauch stated: Securing a three-year Master Framework Agreement with FedEx is an extremely important and commercially validating milestone for us. Notable achievements include: FedEx Master Framework Agreement with 15 trucks delivered. GSA contract award for federal procurement access. W56 extended wheelbase certification. 31 MPGe efficiency demonstrated in FedEx testing.
